regime_fall.current_status: A fragile two-week ceasefire mediated by Pakistan is holding unevenly as Trump announced a naval blockade effective April 14 targeting Iranian oil exports, while intense internal power struggles between President Pezeshkian and hardline IRGC leadership create succession uncertainty amid economic structural collapse and unprecedented domestic unrest.
regime_fall.last_major_event: President Trump announced a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz effective April 14, 2026, targeting Iranian oil exports after 21-hour peace talks in Islamabad collapsed.
